Service Desk Automation for L1 Support
Engineer reads the alert, opens Remedy, searches runbook library to identify the right fix. Decision depends on experience and availability.
estimates blast radius, checks if it's safe to run the fix in production. No consistent scoring — depends on who's on call.
Engineer SSHes into systems, executes steps manually, monitors output, and handles any errors in real time. High cognitive load.
confirms the fix worked, writes resolution notes, closes the Remedy ticket, and updates the runbook if there's time.
@Identity Verification Agent · AI ingests & classifies instantly
Alert auto-ingested from Remedy or Teams. NLP classifies ticket intent and matches the best-fit runbook in under 5 seconds.
@Identity Verification Agent · AI scores confidence & blast radius
Confidence score calculated automatically. Blast radius and business impact assessed against SLA data. Consistent every time.
@Account Update Agent · @Compliance Request Agent · Executes automatically
≥ 85% confidence: auto-executes with full audit trail and rollback checkpoints. < 85%: 1-click
Automated health check confirms resolution. Ticket closed and tagged. RCA and updated runbook published to the knowledge base.
· 4 Specialized Sub-Agents · Orchestrated by L1 Automation Super Agent
